policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="prevId" value="@{
      try {
        var raw = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return null; }
        var j = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(raw);
        return (string)j["previous_response_id"];
      } catch { return null; }
    }" />

    <set-variable name="streaming" value="@{
      try {
        var raw = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return "false"; }
        var j = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(raw);
        var s = j["stream"];
        return (s != null && (bool)s) ? "true" : "false";
      } catch { return "false"; }
    }" />

    <set-variable name="model" value="@{
      try {
        var raw = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return "unknown"; }
        var j = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(raw);
        return (string)(j["model"] ?? "unknown");
      } catch { return "unknown"; }
    }" />

    
    
      
        
        
          
            
            
          
          
            
              
              
                application/json
              
              {"error":{"code":"session_expired","message":"Pinned backend mapping not found. Recreate session by omitting previous_response_id."}}
            
          
        
      
      
        
        
          @(context.Subscription?.Id ?? "anonymous")
        

        
        
        
          
            
            
            
            
          
        

        
        
        
      
    

    
    

    
    
      
      <dimension name="backend-id" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backend-id", "unknown"))" />
      <dimension name="model" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model", "unknown"))" />
      <dimension name="streaming" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("streaming", "false"))" />
    

    
    
    
    
    
      @("Bearer " + (string)context.Variables["msi-access-token"])

outbound.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode == 200 && string.IsNullOrEmpty((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("prevId","")))">
        <set-variable name="newRspId" value="@{
          try {
            var raw = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return null; }
            var j = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(raw);
            return (string)j["id"];
          } catch { return null; }
        }" />
        
          @((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("newRspId","none"))
        
        
          
            <cache-store-value
              key="@("rsp:" + (string)context.Variables["newRspId"])"
              value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backend-id", ""))"
              duration="3600"
              caching-type="external" />
            
              stored
